description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of large, swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings feature upward-angled winglets at their tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two sizable turbofan engines are mounted beneath the wings, one on each side, and the aircraft has a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a series of windows visible along the side for passengers. The exterior is primarily light gray with subtle markings and accents, and the surface appears smooth and metallic.
description: A sleek, modern commercial jet airliner with low-mounted swept wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. The fuselage is light gray with smooth, metallic surfaces and visible passenger windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and both underwing engines with the full wingspan and winglets visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, row of passenger windows, and the left underwing engine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, including the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the right underwing engine, passenger windows, and the full length of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear (not visibly extended in images)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage
